---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Gantry
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this feature solve? Is this related to a current limitation or pain point?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature or improvement you'd like to see. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any workarounds or alternative approaches? Why do they fall short?

## Area

Which part of Gantry does this relate to?

- [ ] Service catalog / entity management
- [ ] Actions / self-service
- [ ] Plugin system
- [ ] API / CLI
- [ ] Dashboard / UI
- [ ] Auth / permissions
- [ ] GitOps / configuration management
- [ ] Other

## Additional Context

Add any mockups, examples from other tools, links, or additional context here.
